title: OHO NetStat Report (01) — Raw Rendered-HTML Capture (FY2025 YTD)
description: Raw rendered-HTML capture of SSA OHO's '01_NetStat_Report' (Average Wait Time Until Hearing Held) page, fetched 2026-05-05 via Playwright. A JSON envelope recording the fetch URL, timestamp, HTTP status, page title, table count, the captured HTML table(s), and page body text. This is the upstream source from which hearing-office-wait-time-LATEST.csv was extracted; it is not itself a tidy table.

columns.name: tables
columns.description: Array of captured HTML table strings (one element: the rendered wait-time table).

source.title: Average Wait Time Until Hearing Held Report (01_NetStat_Report)

notes: Computed: raw rendered-HTML capture (not the official published file format) saved by scripts/playwright-fetch.js; it is the extraction source for the tidy hearing-office-wait-time-LATEST.csv. Period is FY2025 YTD (09/28/2024–09/26/2025), hence temporal_coverage 2024–2025. 'tables' holds a single HTML string, so no per-row schema applies; columns above describe the JSON envelope. Field meanings for the downstream table are documented in FIELD_DEFINITIONS.txt.
